title: Basic JavaScript Promises
description: Write a function that demonstrates the core concepts of JavaScript Promises. Focus on implementing Promise states (pending, fulfilled, rejected) correctly.

title: Intermediate JavaScript Promises
description: Create a function that uses Promise states (pending, fulfilled, rejected) and then(), catch(), finally() together. Handle edge cases and validate inputs.

title: Advanced JavaScript Promises Project
description: Build a small application that applies Promise states (pending, fulfilled, rejected), then(), catch(), finally(), Promise chaining in a real-world scenario. Include error handling and input validation.

title: Debugging JavaScript Promises
description: The following code has bugs related to Promise states (pending, fulfilled, rejected). Find and fix them.

title: Refactoring JavaScript Promises
description: Refactor the following code to use modern JavaScript patterns with Promise states (pending, fulfilled, rejected) and then(), catch(), finally().
